source: BloodHorse All News
title_en: Crazy Hot Mess Becomes First U.S. Winner for Pinehurst

source: BloodHorse All News
title_en: Thesecretadversary Gives Stack First European G1
description: Thesecretadversary proved himself worthy of mention among the best of the 3-year-old crop with a barnstorming all-the-way success in the Prix Jean Prat (G1) under Christophe Soumillon.

source: BloodHorse All News

description: Liam's Law became the first winner for Ocala Stud's multiple graded stakes winner and freshman sire Colonel Liam, after breaking his maiden July 12 in a maiden special weight race over the turf at Saratoga Race Course.

source: BloodHorse All News

description: After jockeys expressed concern for the safety of 2-year-olds competing 1-mile on Saratoga Race Course's inner turf course, the race was moved from to 1 1/16 miles.

source: BloodHorse All News

description: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, the former Emir of Qatar and father to two of the leading owners in world racing, has died in Doha at the age of 74.

source: BloodHorse All News

source: BloodHorse All News

description: Trainer Mark Casse has plenty to look forward to in the coming weeks with grade 1-winners Nitrogen and Counting Stars in upcoming top-level engagements at Saratoga Race Course, and both fillies turned in solo half-mile works July 12.

source: BloodHorse All News
title_en: Fort George to Remain in New York for Clement Turf

source: BloodHorse Thoroughbred Racing
